emails.subject: EES T&D Interest Rate Hedge
emails.body: EES T&D Interest Rate Hedge Vince Osman asked me to forward a copy of the memo to you. We hope to speak to you tomorrow and bring you the original for your approval. Regards, Dave Foti

emails.subject: Re: EES T&D Interest Rate Hedge
emails.body: Re: EES T&D Interest Rate Hedge David, No problem. Please, let me know when you have it. Vince David Foti@EES 12/11/2000 05:52 PM
